query:
SELECT 
  oc.id, oc.name, oc.status, oc.lastSyncAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(oc.lastSyncAt/1000) as lastSyncHuman,
  u.plan, u.subscriptionStatus, u.trialEndsAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(u.trialEndsAt/1000) as trialEndsHuman
FROM outreach_campaigns oc
JOIN users u ON u.id = oc.userId
WHERE oc.status = 'active'
ORDER BY oc.lastSyncAt ASC;
command:

SELECT 
  oc.id, oc.name, oc.status, oc.lastSyncAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(oc.lastSyncAt/1000) as lastSyncHuman,
  u.plan, u.subscriptionStatus, u.trialEndsAt,
  FROM_UNIXTIME(u.trialEndsAt/1000) as trialEndsHuman
FROM outreach_campaigns oc
JOIN users u ON u.id = oc.userId
WHERE oc.status = 'active'
ORDER BY oc.lastSyncAt ASC;
